title: About the Platform

meta.line1: Information page about the TyPlace platform.
meta.line2: The current version is published on this page.

intro: TyPlace is an online platform for posting listings, making user-to-user transactions, and using safe transaction tools for digital goods and services.

section1.title: 1. What TyPlace is
section1.p1: The TyPlace platform is designed for interaction between users who sell and buy digital goods and services.
section1.p2: TyPlace provides an interface for listing offers, communicating through chat, creating orders, using internal balance functions, support tools, and dispute resolution features.

section2.title: 2. How the platform works
section2.l2: purchasing digital goods and services through the platform interface;
section2.l3: using internal balance and safe transaction mechanisms;
section2.l4: chat, reviews, support, disputes, and other related service features.

section3.title: 3. Platform status
section3.p1: TyPlace is a platform and information intermediary that provides users with technical tools for interaction and making transactions.
section3.p2: The platform is not the seller of digital goods and services offered in user listings and does not become a party to the transaction between users unless expressly stated otherwise in separate service terms.

section4.title: 4. Safety and control
section4.p1: To improve safety, the platform may use various protection and control measures, including:
section4.l1: safe transaction mechanisms and temporary holding of funds until the order is completed;
section4.l2: a support request and dispute handling system;
section4.l3: moderation, anti-fraud checks, and restrictions in case of suspicious activity;
section4.l4: technical activity logs and internal security measures.

section5.title: 5. International use
section5.p1: The platform may be used by users from different countries. The user is solely responsible for complying with the laws of their jurisdiction, as well as the rules of the digital services, games, and platforms that may relate to the subject of the transaction.
